title: Chopper Reveals His Forms
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on chopper reveals his forms, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Reveals His Forms. Chopper fights Chessmarimo with the power of the Rumble Ball while the struggle for Drum Castle intensifies. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: My rumble ball is a drug that specifically alters the Wavelengths omitted by each form!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: After 5 years of research, I've discovered 4 additional transforma- lion points!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Nghhh...! So what if you have a few extra!

dialogue.speaker: Chessmarimo
dialogue.text: Seven freakin' forms!? He's the world's coolest reindeer!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, he just can't control his excitement after hearing 7 transformation forms.

dialogue.speaker: Chessmarimo
dialogue.text: Hey! What happened to our battle!? Are we still fighting or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A few extra forms just for show isn't enough to scare me!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Let me warn you now that my "iron-hooves,"

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Know your place! Marimo's Super surprise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: H-He just gogged the castle wall with that attack...!
